Open the session popup to filter, tick, and confirm exercises
Pick multiple in the popup, confirm, then drag them into order below.
Note: pause if shifting weight off R hind
Note: keep pace slow, even rhythm
Open the popup for this session, tick the exercises you want, confirm, then drag to reorder.

Reps, sets and hold pre-fill from each exercise's defaults and remain editable per session
Note: pause if weight shifts off R hind
3 selected · confirm then drag to reorder in session
Selected · tap to remove, then confirm add

svg.text: Layout-only · session add uses a multi-select picker popup/sheet with filters and tick selection · drag and drop is the primary reorder method · metadata prefills from exercise defaults but stays editable · non-drag reorder remains available for accessibility (WCAG 2.2 SC 2.5.7)
